title: DSA Practice Boost: AI-assisted problem solving on CodeGrind
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's AI-assisted problem solving to accelerate DSA practice with Azure OpenAI integration and real-time editor feedback.
core_message: Demonstrate how CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with AI guidance, real-time execution, and Google authentication to streamline practice, track progress, and boost coding confidence.
cta: Try a sample AI-assisted challenge now and compare AI guidance vs. solo solving in CodeGrind.
visual_brief: A short 30-45 second screen-capture video: 1) user opens CodeGrind, 2) selects a LeetCode-style problem, 3) AI assistant panel appears with suggested approaches, 4) code editor runs with Azure Judge0, 5) dashboard showing progress streak and score. Overlay captions highlight AI guidance, real-time feedback, and secure sign-in.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

linkedin.text: Introducing CodeGrind DSai-assisted Practice Boost — a video-led showcase of AI-guided problem solving for faster DSA practice. Watch real-time guidance, live execution with Judge0, and progress tracking in the dashboard. Secure sign-in with Google authentication, and compare AI guidance to solo solving. Try a sample AI-assisted challenge now at CodeGrind.
